name: auto-skill-finder
description: Universal AI skill router with dual-mode discipline: ponytail for code, caveman for chat. Auto-routes any prompt to the best installed skill. Zero slash commands. ~75% fewer tokens. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, OpenCode.
author: prantikmedhi

skills.name: auto-skill-finder
skills.description: Universal AI skill router with dual-mode discipline (ponytail code vs caveman chat)

skills.name: ponytail-code
skills.description: Ponytail mode for code tasks — lazy senior dev, YAGNI ladder, shortest diff

skills.name: caveman-chat
skills.description: Caveman mode for chat — terse prose only, no engineering overhead

hooks.description: Writes caveman-active flag and injects caveman rules as system context
Per-prompt: detects intent, routes to best skill, compresses and injects context
